rule: STRATEGY: Use ONLY 'bid_ask' strategy with SOL-side deployment (X token). Max Price must be 0% (no bins above active). Min Price must cover -40% to -70% range. Use 'deployAmountSol: 0.7'.
EXIT: Close position immediately if Fee/TVL 24h (Yield) drops below 7%.
EXIT: Close position if Out-of-Range (OOR) > 15 minutes, or price drops -10% from entry, or take profit 5% with trailing stop 3% from peak.
